response.justification: Bogdan is a seasoned, versatile engineer with strong software craftsmanship, but his profile does not match this role's core requirement of deep, current C++ expertise. His only professional C++ position was a seven-month stint at National Instruments ending in 2015, and C++ does not even appear in his skills list. His recent decade is dominated by web and full-stack work in TypeScript, Node.js, and DLang. He has no evident exposure to MQTT, industrial protocols, IEC 62443, or Secure Development Lifecycle practices, and no industrial automation domain background, making him a poor fit despite genuine systems-programming aptitude.
strengths: Low-latency, high-throughput systems experience (async I/O, fibers, caching) at Sociomantic, handling millions of requests per second
Strong engineering craftsmanship: TDD, CI/CD, testing tools authorship, plus proven mentoring and workshop/teaching track record
Event-driven architecture experience and advantageous-skill coverage in Node.js, React, and cloud deployment
concerns: Professional C++ experience is minimal and dated (~7 months, ended 2015); recent work is almost entirely web/full-stack
No exposure to industrial cybersecurity (IEC 62443), SDL, MQTT, or industrial automation protocols required by the role
Cloud experience is AWS-based rather than Azure, and no evidence of message-broker-based large-scale application design in C++ contexts

key_factors.factor: Insufficient C++ depth for a C++-centric role
No industrial automation or IEC 62443 security background
Strong general systems and low-latency engineering skills
